However, the company's website (http://necac.org) is currently returning a 403 Forbidden error, making it impossible to verify active operations, service offerings, service area, or organizational details. Community action corporations traditionally serve low-income populations through federally-funded programs, but specific details for this entity remain unverifiable. Any consumer considering contacting this organization should attempt direct phone or in-person contact to confirm services and current operations before relying on this company for financial assistance.
